$comment: The ONE place that couples the harness to your project's language. The harness tooling (init.sh, tools/mutate.py) runs on Python 3.9+, but your target project can be in any language: set test_command to however you run your suite. Examples: Python -> 'python3 -m unittest discover -s tests -q'; JS/TS -> 'npm test --silent'; Go -> 'go test ./...'; Rust -> 'cargo test -q'.

mutation.$comment: Policy for the mutation phase. enabled: true = always run it; false = never run it (the feature closes with the judge's approval alone); "ask" = the craftsman_lead asks the human at the Gherkin approval gate and records the answer in that feature's entry in feature_list.json. A feature entry with its own "mutation": true|false always wins over this. threshold = minimum killed/total required over the new or touched lines.
